content.text:
Based on my visual inspection of the molecule, I can clearly see the atom N:7 (nitrogen at index 7) and its covalent bonds.

**Neighbor atoms of atom 7 (N):**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 6 | C (Carbon) |
| 8 | C (Carbon) |
| 43 | C (Carbon) |

**Summary:**
- Atom 7 is a nitrogen (N) atom
- It has **3 neighbor atoms**, all of which are carbon atoms
- The nitrogen is covalently bonded to:
  - **C:6** - part of the fused ring system
  - **C:8** - part of the fused ring system
  - **C:43** - a methyl carbon (CH₃ group) with hydrogens H:44 and H:45 attached

**geomconf_index:** 5513

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 7, whose element should be N. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
